title: nephrodium lanuginosum
intro: Nephrodium lanuginosum, also known as the woolly maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium lanuginosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Nephrodium lanuginosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
